wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Relic Infobox|Shovel|2}}
{{R|Shovel||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Rare|Rare|2}} {{2|Relic}}. It adds a "Dig" option to {{2|Rest Sites}}, which allows the player to receive a random {{2|Relic}} that is {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Common|Common|2}}, {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}}, or {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Rare|Rare|2}}. The random relic can't be a {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Shop|Shop|2}}, {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}}, or {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} relic.

== Sources ==

== Spawn Restrictions ==

== Interactions ==

===Synergies===
* {{R|Miniature Tent||2}}: Allows Shovel to be used without giving up other [[Slay the Spire 2:Rest Sites|Rest Site]] options.
* {{R|Golden Compass||2}}: Creates an [[Slay the Spire 2:Hive|Act 2]] path with 4 rest sites to dig with Shovel, which may be more than were previously available.
* {{R|Venerable Tea Set||2}} and {{R|Venerable Tea Set???||2}}: Grants {{KW|Energy||2}} upon entering a combat after a [[Slay the Spire 2:Rest Sites|Rest Site]], which Shovel encourages visiting.
* Any option that makes other [[Slay the Spire 2:Rest Sites|Rest Site]] options such as resting and smithing less valuable can improve Shovel by proxy.
** For resting this can include any reliable source of healing such {{R|Burning Blood||2}}, and in particular {{R|Eternal Feather||2}} since it will activate at the rest site.
** For smithing this can include any alternate source of upgrading cards such as {{R|Yummy Cookie||2}} or {{C|Apotheosis||2}} obtained via {{R|Jewelry Box||2}}.

===Anti-Synergies===
* Anything that provides alternate options at [[Slay the Spire 2:Rest Sites|Rest Sites]] will make Shovel worse by proxy of only 1 option being able to be chosen (unless also having {{R|Miniature Tent||2}}) This includes:
** Lift via {{R|Girya||2}}
** Clone via {{R|Pael's Growth||2}}.
** Cook via {{R|Meat Cleaver||2}}.
** Hatch via {{C|Byrdonis Egg||2}}.
** Mend in [[Slay the Spire 2:Multiplayer|Multiplayer]].
* Additionally anything that improves pre-existing [[Slay the Spire 2:Rest Sites|Rest Site]] options will go wasted when digging with Shovel. This includes:
** {{R|Dream Catcher||2}} granting a card reward upon resting.
** {{R|Tiny Mailbox||2}} granting a random potion upon resting.
** {{R|Stone Humidifier||2}} granting 5 max HP upon resting.
** {{R|Regal Pillow||2}} granting 15 HP upon resting.

== Trivia ==
*The Shovel's appearance is based on the shovel in [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shovel_Knight Shovel Knight], with the yellow hand guard and blue accents
